subject: Shedinja, a hollow cicada-shell creature with a golden halo, floating against a radiant sunburst background
description: A hollow, chitinous creature resembling a shed cicada exoskeleton floats center-frame, its back split open at the top. A golden ring — a halo — floats above the empty shell. The background radiates in warm golden-orange and yellow tones, with concentric light rays emanating outward in a sunburst pattern, giving the image a strangely sacred or ethereal quality. The creature's body is brown and tan, translucent-feeling, with no visible interior — just an empty husk elevated by its luminous ring. The contrast between the hollow, dead-looking shell and the radiant angelic aura is the visual tension at the center of the piece.
foreground: hollow cicada exoskeleton with split back, floating; golden halo ring above
background: radiant sunburst in warm golden-orange and yellow
